Package component.modifier.changer

Class Arithmetic

java.lang.Object
component.modifier.Modifier
component.modifier.changer.Changer<Integer>
component.modifier.changer.Arithmetic
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tippable, GridIndexable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Adder, Divider, Multiplier, Subtractor
public abstract class Arithmetic extends Changer<Integer>
The Arithmetic class is the base for all modifiers that perform mathematical operations on a card's numerical value.

This class introduces material-based logic: any Card with the Material.METAL property is immune to arithmetic modifications and will pass through these tiles unchanged.

  • Method Details

    • modify

      public void modify(Card card)
      Attempts to apply a mathematical modification to the given card.

      Before applying the modification, it checks the card's material. If the card is made of Material.METAL, the modification is aborted. Otherwise, it proceeds to the standard Changer.modify(Card) workflow, which handles health reduction for fragile cards and eventual value changes. * @param card The Card to be checked and potentially modified.

      Overrides:
      modify in class Changer<Integer>
      Parameters:
      card - The card passing through the tile.
